title: Firefox RC3
body: I have installed the near-final version of Firefox 3 in this [link](http://www.mozilla.com/en-US/firefox/all-rc.html "Download Firefox 3"). The first impressions are very good, especially in terms of loading, it's very fast. I've only found some incompatibility with some extensions and personally I liked the design of the default buttons from the previous version more, although now the menus are even more customizable. Now all that's left is for the general public to realize that Firefox is infinitely better than Internet Explorer, let's see if they achieve media coverage in their official presentation on June 17th and thanks to the [Guinness download record](http://www.maestrosdelweb.com/actualidad/firefox-intentara-batir-el-record-guinness/ "Firefox download record") that they will surely achieve. Although I think that the definitive success of Firefox lies in its [mobile version](http://labs.mozilla.com/2008/06/firefox-mobile-concept-video/ "Firefox mobile"), which is now in development, where the usability aspect will be the determining point for a product to stand out above others (Safari, IE, Opera, Firefox, Flock, ...).
